person.name: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond

nameForms.fullText: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond

spouse.name: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor

zh.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond於1270年之前與Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond于1270年之前与Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Mór
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.

variants.name: Mohr
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

nameMeanings.name: Domhnaill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’. See also Donald .

nameMeanings.name: Óge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Danish vernacular form of Aghi, a short form of the various names of Old Norse origin containing the element ag ‘edge (of a weapon)’ or ‘awe, terror’.

en.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond married Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor before 1270, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond a épousé Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor avant 1270, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond hat vor 1270 in Irland Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond lui sposato Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor prima del 1270, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmondは1270年以前にアイルランドでMrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Morと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond(은)는 1270년 이전 아일랜드에서 Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond casou-se com Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor antes 1270, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond женился на женщине по имени Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor перед 1270 г. в местности Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond se casó con Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor antes de 1270, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
